creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Fri Feb 15 02:49:57 2013
New Revision: 312265
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312265

Log:
  Beets is the media library management system for
  obsessive-compulsive music geeks.
  
  WWW: http://beets.radbox.org/
  
  PR:		ports/176087
  Submitted by:	Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>

Added:
  head/audio/beets/
  head/audio/beets/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/beets/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/beets/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/audio/beets/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/audio/Makefile

Modified: head/audio/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 02:49:05 2013	(r312264)
+++ head/audio/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 02:49:57 2013	(r312265)
@@ -65,6 +65,7 @@
     SUBDIR += beast
     SUBDIR += bebocd
     SUBDIR += beep
+    SUBDIR += beets
     SUBDIR += blop
     SUBDIR += bmp-crossfade
     SUBDIR += bmp-faad

Added: head/audio/beets/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/beets/Makefile	Fri Feb 15 02:49:57 2013	(r312265)
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+# Created by: Mark Felder <feld@feld.me>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	beets
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
+CATEGORIES=	audio python
+
+MAINTAINER=	feld@feld.me
+COMMENT=	A media library management system for obsessive-compulsive music geeks
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}setuptools>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-setuptools
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}mutagen>=0:${PORTSDIR}/audio/py-mutagen \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}unidecode>=0:${PORTSDIR}/converters/py-unidecode \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}musicbrainzngs>=0:${PORTSDIR}/audio/py-musicbrainzngs \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}munkres>=0:${PORTSDIR}/math/py-munkres
+
+USE_PYTHON=	2.7+
+
+USE_GITHUB=	yes
+GH_ACCOUNT=	sampsyo
+GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
+GH_COMMIT=	d06ca1e
+
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+do-build:
+	@(cd ${BUILD_WRKSRC}; ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} ${PYTHON_CMD} \
+		${PYSETUP} build)
+
+do-install:
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/beet ${PREFIX}/bin/
+	${INSTALL} -d ${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR}/beets
+	cd ${WRKSRC}/build/lib && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} \* ${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR}/
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Added: head/audio/beets/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/audio/beets/distinfo	Fri Feb 15 02:49:57 2013	(r312265)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (beets-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 23092add10135d07c67c5b9b576192bd1c0e12699b2691efed824b8b4e055bf8
+SIZE (beets-1.0.0.tar.gz) = 529109

==============================================================================

+++ head/audio/beets/pkg-descr	Fri Feb 15 02:49:57 2013	(r312265)
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+Beets is the media library management system for 
+obsessive-compulsive music geeks.
+
+WWW: http://beets.radbox.org/
